html:
Exclusive to:

Limpets are a Fish Food Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be found growing naturally on Limpet Rocks, and as long as the Limpet Rock is not mined down, the Limpets will replenish themselves over 3 days. They can also be found on Wrecks and will replenish themselves over 2 days if the Wreck is not hammered. They can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, and give 0.5 Fish Value.

Cooked Limpets

Cooked Limpets are obtained by cooking Limpets on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They do not deduct Sanity, unlike their raw counterpart, restore a tiny bit of Health, and take longer to spoil. They can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, in which they will give 0.5 Fish Value.

Trivia

  • Limpets are aquatic snails with a shell that is conically shaped. True limpets (in the Patellidae family) live on hard surfaces in the intertidal zone and are capable of locomotion, unlike barnacles or mussels. Such as in Don't Starve, limpets are eaten as seafood in many countries.
  • Limpets make a small "splat" sound when picked.

Gallery

  • Limpets on a Limpet Rock.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Maybe starving wouldn't be so bad.”
–Wilson
“A little lick of flame and you'll be tasty.”
–Willow
“Is snail? Maybe.”
–Wolfgang
“They eat of the rock. I eat of them.”
–Wendy
“SMALL PROTEIN SOURCE”
–WX-78
“Patella vulgata.”
–Wickerbottom
“Some sort of water-dwelling snail.”
–Woodie
“Slimy and vaguely ingestible.”
–Maxwell
“I will refrain from eating this in its raw form.”
–Wagstaff
“Röck meat!”
–Wigfrid
“Do we have to eat these?”
–Webber
“They're free from the hustle and bustle of daily life.”
–Walani
“They have a salty aroma.”
–Warly
“Ye'll be in me tummy soon 'nuff.”
–Woodlegs
“BERRIES O' THE ROCKS”
–Wilba
“Rock Glub Glubs”
–Wormwood
“Mmm... food from a rock. Fine dining.”
–Wheeler
Limpets are a Fish Food Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be found growing naturally on Limpet Rocks, and as long as the Limpet Rock is not mined down, the Limpets will replenish themselves over 3 days. They can also be found on Wrecks and will replenish themselves over 2 days if the Wreck is not hammered. They can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, and give 0.5 Fish Value.
Cooked Limpets[edit | edit source]
“Escargotcha!”
–Wilson
“Pretty good!”
–Willow
“It is slimy going down.”
–Wolfgang
“Depressing.”
–Wendy
“A WELCOME IMPROVEMENT”
–WX-78
“Cooked Patella vulgata.”
–Wickerbottom
“Dinner's on.”
–Woodie
“A delicacy? Really?”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically it will cause me less stomach upset in this form.”
–Wagstaff
“Let us feast!”
–Wigfrid
“Tastes like ocean.”
–Webber
“Still a bit slimy.”
–Walani
“Smooth, salty, scrumptious.”
–Warly
“Yaaarm!”
–Woodlegs
“FWOOSH'D BERRIES O' THE ROCKS”
–Wilba
“Goes in belly”
–Wormwood
“I've heard the best food comes from a rock.”
–Wheeler
Cooked Limpets are obtained by cooking Limpets on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. They do not deduct Sanity, unlike their raw counterpart, restore a tiny bit of Health, and take longer to spoil. They can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, in which they will give 0.5 Fish Value.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Limpets are aquatic snails with a shell that is conically shaped. True limpets (in the Patellidae family) live on hard surfaces in the intertidal zone and are capable of locomotion, unlike barnacles or mussels. Such as in Don't Starve, limpets are eaten as seafood in many countries.
Limpets make a small "splat" sound when picked.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Limpet là một Thức ăn cho Cá trong Shipwrecked DLC. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy mọc tự nhiên trên Đá Limpet và miễn là Đá Limpet không bị khai thác, Đá Limpet sẽ tự bổ sung trong vòng 3 ngày. Chúng cũng có thể được tìm thấy trên Xác tàu và sẽ tự bổ sung sau 2 ngày nếu Xác tàu không bị đóng búa. Chúng có thể được sử dụng làm nguyên liệu trong một số công thức nấu Nồi Hầm và mang lại 0,5 Giá trị Cá.

'''Limpets''' are a [[Fishes|Fish]] [[Food]] [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They can be found growing naturally on [[Limpet Rock]]s, and as long as the Limpet Rock is not mined down, the Limpets will replenish themselves over 3 days. They can also be found on [[Wreck]]s and will replenish themselves over 2 days if the Wreck is not hammered. They can be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes, and give 0.5 [[Crock Pot#Fish.2FSeafood value|Fish Value]].
__NOTOC__
==Cooked Limpets==

Cooked Limpets are obtained by cooking Limpets on a [[Campfire]], [[Fire Pit]], [[Star]], [[Chiminea]], or [[Obsidian Fire Pit]]. They do not deduct Sanity, unlike their raw counterpart, restore a tiny bit of Health, and take longer to spoil. They can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, in which they will give 0.5 Fish Value.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Limpets are aquatic snails with a shell that is conically shaped. True limpets (in the Patellidae family) live on hard surfaces in the intertidal zone and are capable of locomotion, unlike barnacles or mussels. Such as in ''Don't Starve'', limpets are eaten as seafood in many countries.
* Limpets make a small "splat" sound when picked.
